description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Woodbridge, Ontario, Canada in 1979 by Frank Lenti and Gennaro Raso. Operates chapters in Canada, Italy, the United States, and other countries. Known for its elaborate patch and involvement in conflicts with other biker gangs. Estimated to have 1,000 active members globally.

country_links.context: The Loners Motorcycle Club has territory in Australia.
